finding_results.notes: Post-signature section was compressed and resequenced so each retained block advances an external consequence or decision: hard transfer deadline, explicit housing loss trigger, meeting attendance condition, transfer completion proof, and final go/no-go condition before departure.

Confession beat now includes concrete embodied details from the 2021 failure and a disrupted self-implicating admission; immediate soothing praise was removed and replaced with renewed pressure into terms.

summary: Revised Chapter 5 to harden the rehab-confession scene and tighten the back-half architecture around escalating external stakes (money deadline, housing consequence, meeting commitment), while preserving continuity and voice signatures.
